characters.appearance: Young woman with a fair complexion and long, wavy brown hair. She has soft facial features and a gentle gaze.
characters.wardrobe: White, off-the-shoulder top or dress with ruffled details.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Interview room के बाहर, मुझे बहुत घबराहट हो रही थी। [Outside the interview room, I was feeling very nervous.]
Unknown speaker says: Nervous - घबराहट [Nervous - Anxiety]
Character A says: But... what should I say? I asked myself, hesitating. [But... what should I say? I asked myself, hesitating.]
Unknown speaker says: Hesitating - हिचकिचाना [Hesitating - Hesitation]
Character A says: I stood before the manager in silence, my confidence dropping [I stood before the manager in silence, my confidence dropping]
Unknown speaker says: Confidence - आत्मविश्वास [Confidence - Self-belief]
Character A says: and my heart beating faster than ever before. [and my heart beating faster than ever before.]
Unknown speaker says: Beating - धड़कना [Beating - Throbbing]
Character A says: Though I could not yet speak fluently, [Though I could not yet speak fluently,]
Unknown speaker says: Fluently - फर्राटेदार [Fluently - Fluently]
Character A says: I remembered the practice I did on Supernova, [I remembered the practice I did on Supernova,]
Unknown speaker says: Practice - अभ्यास [Practice - Practice]
Character A says: I felt that my fears were left behind, [I felt that my fears were left behind,]
Unknown speaker says: Behind - पीछे [Behind - Behind]
Character A says: and a new door of opportunities was opening. [and a new door of opportunities was opening.]
Unknown speaker says: Opportunities - अवसर [Opportunities - Opportunities]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Transforms the original's seductive reading into a relatable, high-stakes professional scenario (a job interview).
- Highlights Supernova's core value proposition: building vocabulary and confidence for real-world situations.
- Maintains the interactive 'read and translate' pacing of the original but shifts the payoff from mysterious intrigue to career empowerment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SUPERNOVA के साथ रोज़ 10 मिनट इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें (LEARN TO SPEAK ENGLISH WITH SUPERNOVA JUST 10 MINUTES A DAY)
AI Tutor के साथ प्रैक्टिस करें (Practice with AI Tutor)
Real-world situations: Job Interview (Real-world situations: Job Interview)
सुनो (Listen) बोलो (Speak) सीखो (Learn) + रोज़ नए शब्द (+ New words daily)
Interview room के बाहर, मुझे बहुत घबराहट हो रही थी।
But... what should I say? I asked myself, hesitating.
I stood before the manager in silence, my confidence dropping and my heart beating faster than ever before.
Though I could not yet speak fluently, I remembered the practice I did on Supernova.
I felt that my fears were left behind, and a new door of opportunities was opening.
घबराहट (Nervous)
हिचकिचाना (Hesitating)
आत्मविश्वास (Confidence)
धड़कना (Beating)
फर्राटेदार (Fluently)
अभ्यास (Practice)
पीछे (Behind)
अवसर (Opportunities)
